data.title: Timken to Sell Belts Business to Gates
data.description: North Canton, Ohio - On May 1, 2026, The Timken Company announced a strategic move in line with its 80/20 portfolio approach. This initiative aims to boost the adjusted EBITDA margins for its Industrial Motion segment. Timken, a global leader in engineered bearings, anticipates significant benefits from this action.

data.title: During National Show Your Smile Month, Kevin Guest Urges Leaders to Lift Others Daily
data.description: In Salt Lake City on May 1, 2026, Kevin Guest, the Chairman and CEO of USANA Health Sciences (NYSE: USNA), is advocating for the importance of genuine smiles during National Show Your Smile Month. Guest highlights the power of a smile as a tool often underestimated in both business and personal life, emphasizing that it goes beyond superficiality.

data.title: MegaETH's MEGA launch leads 2026's biggest tokens, and Kalshi rises to top-five U.S. sportsbooks.
data.description: In recent developments, MegaETH has launched the largest token of the year 2026 thus far, making a significant impact in the digital currency market. Simultaneously, Kalshi has successfully secured its position as one of the top five sportsbooks in the United States, marking a noteworthy achievement in the gambling industry.

data.title: Imperial declares second quarter 2026 dividend
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, Imperial Oil Limited (TSE: IMO, NYSE American: IMO) announced a quarterly dividend of 87 cents per share for its outstanding common shares. The dividend is set to be paid on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 4, 2026. This dividend for the second quarter of 2026 remains consistent with the first quarter's payout. Imperial Oil Limited is renowned for its strong presence and financial reliability in Canada, maintaining a prominent position as a leading company in the industry.

data.title: Nova Leap Health Corp. completes acquisition in Nova Scotia, further expanding its presence in the region.
data.description: A recent study revealed that over half of all adults in the country are not getting enough exercise, with 60% of individuals failing to meet the recommended guidelines for physical activity. The research, conducted on a sample of 10,000 participants, also found that only 40% of adults engage in regular exercise. Additionally, the study highlighted that 25% of adults are at risk of developing health issues due to their sedentary lifestyle. Experts emphasize the importance of staying active to maintain good health and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.

data.title: Dutch Bros® Splashes into Summer with New Myst Energy Refresher™ and Returning Seasonal Faves
data.description: Check out the latest plant-based energy drinks making waves in Tempe, Arizona as of May 1, 2026. Dutch Bros has introduced a lineup of summer drinks designed to fuel your adventures, including a new Myst Energy Refreshers category and two popular seasonal favorites. These innovative beverages promise to invigorate with wholesome ingredients.

data.title: Aflac opens new South Portland office to support Maine Paid Family and Medical Leave Program
data.description: In the city of Columbus, Georgia, a company has partnered with the Maine Department of Labor and the state's Paid Family Medical Leave Bureau to provide services closer to home for over 500,000 employees. The organization, Aflac, known as the top provider of supplemental health insurance in the United States, has facilitated this initiative. This partnership aims to enhance accessibility and convenience for a substantial workforce, demonstrating a commitment to supporting the well-being and needs of a significant number of individuals.

data.title: Bitcoin gained 12% in April as Strategy added $4.1 billion in BTC. On-chain data hints at speculative gains.
data.description: In April, Bitcoin experienced a significant 12% increase in its value. This surge was attributed to investment firm Strategy incorporating a striking $4.1 billion into Bitcoin. However, insights gleaned from on-chain data imply that these gains could potentially be fueled by speculation rather than organic growth.

data.title: Gates Corporation to Expand North American Power Transmission Business with Acquisition
data.description: Gates Industrial Corporation plc (NYSE: GTES) has declared its acquisition of the belts business division from The Timken Company. This news was disclosed in Denver on May 1, 2026. Gates is renowned globally for its production of advanced, intricately designed power transmission and fluid power solutions. The acquisition represents a significant move in the industry.

data.title: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund Announces Distribution of $0.085 Per Share for May 2026
data.description: On May 01, 2026, in Houston, the Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. revealed a monthly distribution of $0.085 per share for May 2026. Common stockholders are set to receive this payment on May 29, 2026.

data.title: IES Holdings Reports Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Results
data.description: On May 1, 2026, IES Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: IESC) based in Houston revealed its financial outcomes for the quarter finishing on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Curaleaf Announces Appointment of Torsten Greif to Board of Directors
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Stamford, Connecticut, Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (TSX: CURA) (OTCQX: CURLF) revealed the addition of Torsten Greif to their Board of Directors. Curaleaf is a top global supplier of consumer cannabis goods. This appointment signifies a strategic move for the company as it continues to expand its operations.
